name: TC
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TC] @TBLNAME AS NVARCHAR(MAX)

AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
  DECLARE @RC AS INT
  DECLARE @RX AS INT SET @RX=1
  DECLARE @CC AS NVARCHAR(MAX) SET @CC=''
  SET @RC=(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys.columns WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE [OBJECT_ID]=(SELECT [OBJECT_ID] FROM sys.tables WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE name=@TBLNAME) )
  T:
  IF @RX>=@RC 
  BEGIN goto sn END
  SET @CC = @CC + 
   (SELECT name  FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY column_id ASC) AS 'Row',* FROM sys.columns WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE [OBJECT_ID]=(SELECT [OBJECT_ID] FROM sys.tables WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE name=@TBLNAME))T
    WHERE Row =@RX)+','
    SET @RX=@RX+1
   GOTO T
 sn:
 IF LEN(@CC)>0 SET @CC=SUBSTRING(@CC,1,LEN(@CC)-1)
 SELECT @CC
